rationale: The only resume change was employer names (re:cinq→Acme Software, Optilyz→Pinepoint Systems, GISCollective→Northwind Labs), all keeping the same Berlin location and identical described work. Both evaluations scored 8/10 with substantively equivalent reasoning: strong TypeScript/Node/React full-stack profile, AI-agent tooling experience, and the same concerns about limited Nest.js and Kotlin/Java. The minor wording differences in concerns (mentioning Dlang/embedded systems vs. generic 'different areas') are ordinary run-to-run variation and reference the candidate's actual technologies, not the renamed employers. No score change or new concern keys off the company-name swap.
